title: Mario Paint Composer - Octopus (Game & Watch Gallery 4)
description:
LOVE this tune. Love it, love it, love it. I probably should've used double tempo to better accommodate the echo, though. It's amazing how snugly most of it fits in the octave MPC allows. It's hard to really do it justice with the Mario Paint instruments, though.

Once again done with a MIDI crutch. I really do wish I had the skill and patience to pick this stuff apart by ear, but alas. I am a horrible cheater.
